title: Mammillaria ortizrubioana

intro: Mammillaria ortizrubioana is a species of cactus native to Mexico, belonging to the family Cactaceae and characterized by its small, globular stems covered in fine, white spines. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in wound healing and the treatment of infections. The bioactive constituents of Mammillaria ortizrubioana include saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
